blocks.text: Bodø/Glimt's greatest night — four Champions League deciders kick off
Perfectly balanced on aggregate in Lisbon. For a club from the Arctic Circle, this is the biggest 90 minutes in Norwegian club football history — nothing comes close.

blocks.label: ⚽ CL Second Legs — Wednesday
items: 18:45 — Newcastle vs Barcelona at Camp Nou, level on aggregate
21:00 — Liverpool need Anfield magic vs Galatasaray, trailing 0-1
